Who We Are
## Europe’s wholesale
vehicle partner
![Autorent Europe transporter](https://www.autorentgroup.com/who_we_are_truck.webp)
### Structured B2B vehicle supply across Europe. Fast, reliable, compliant.
Autorent Europe is a specialized B2B distributor of brand-new, zero-kilometre vehicles. We operate across 30+ global markets, sourcing from manufacturers and authorized importers, delivering to dealers, fleet operators, and rent-a-car companies. Our team brings 20+ years of combined experience in international vehicle distribution.
Our technology-driven approach identifies pricing opportunities across markets in real-time, helping our partners access competitive stock through multiple sourcing channels.
* All vehicles brand-new, zero-km, full manufacturer warranty
* Certificate of Conformity (CoC) with every delivery
* Full truckload logistics — 7-9 vehicles per transport
* Flexible payment terms for established partners
* Multi-brand sourcing from a single supplier
[Get Stock List ›](https://www.autorentgroup.com/#contact)
Why Autorent Europe
## Partners, not just
suppliers.
### We Respect Our Sources
Collaborative relationships with importers and manufacturers. We don’t undercut or bypass supply partners.
### Flexible Partner Terms
Transparent terms from day one. Flexible payment structures available for qualified partners, including deferred payment and credit-backed allocation.
### Technology-Driven Pricing
Proprietary systems monitor pricing across markets in real-time. Data-driven sourcing across multiple markets.
### Legally & Fiscally Verified
Every vehicle verified legally and fiscally. VIES compliance, clean documentation, minimal risk for your business.
![Autorent Europe transport fleet](https://www.autorentgroup.com/truck_fleet.webp)
Our Fleet & Logistics
## Own fleet. Fully
insured transport.
We operate our own branded transport fleet — Mercedes-Benz and Scania car carriers — ensuring complete control over quality and delivery timelines. Every shipment is fully insured.
**3** Branded carriers
**€2M** Cargo insurance
**7-9** Vehicles per load
**12 days** Avg. delivery
What We Do
## Built for volume.
Optimized for speed.
From sourcing to delivery, we handle the entire supply chain so you can focus on selling.
### Cross-Market Sourcing
We monitor pricing across markets in real-time, helping our partners access competitive pricing through structured multi-market sourcing.
### Door-to-Door Logistics
Own fleet transport, 7-9 vehicles per carrier. Average delivery: 12 days from order to your lot. Fully insured.
### Complete Documentation
CoC, Brief, invoice, CMR — everything ready and correct. Documentation prepared to accelerate registration and resale in your market.
### Fleet & Rent-a-Car
Volume supply for fleet operators and rent-a-car companies. Consistent pricing, dedicated account management.
### Export Solutions
EU and non-EU export: Gulf, Africa, Asia, South America. Container shipping, customs, port delivery — we coordinate end-to-end.
### Multi-Brand Access
One supplier, all major brands. VW, BMW, Toyota, Hyundai, Kia, Skoda, Dacia, Renault, Peugeot and more.
B2B Transaction Process
## Transparent. Compliant.
Built for dealers.
### Intra-Community (Netto) Sales
Full EU VAT compliance:
* VIES-verified VAT numbers
* Net invoicing for EU businesses
* EU VAT Directive 2006/112/EC
* Pro-forma before every shipment
### B2B Logistics
Purpose-built for wholesale:
* Own fleet — 7 to 9 vehicles/transport
* Door-to-door across all EU
* Container shipping for non-EU
* Real-time tracking
### Fast Documentation
Dealer’s biggest pain — solved:
* CoC with every vehicle
* Brief / Fahrzeugbrief ready
* Invoice pack within 24h
* All vehicles legally verified
How It Works
## From enquiry to
delivery in 4 steps
Simple, transparent, fast. No hidden fees, no surprises.
1
### You Tell Us What You Need
Brand, model, spec, quantity. We check across all sources in real-time.
2
### We Send You Options
Competitive pricing, full specs. Multiple options. No obligation.
3
### You Confirm & We Source
Pro-forma, payment, we handle sourcing, docs, quality check.
4
### Delivered to Your Door
Own fleet transport, all documents ready. ~12 days to delivery.

Where We Operate
## 30+ markets.
One supplier.
From the heart of Europe to the Gulf, Africa, and Asia — we source and deliver wherever your business needs us.
**All European Union** 27 member states + UK, Switzerland, Norway
**North Africa** Morocco, Algeria, Tunisia, Libya, Egypt
**Middle East** UAE, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar
**China** Import & export channels
**South Korea** Hyundai & Kia sourcing
**South America** Brazil, Argentina, Chile
**LHD Vehicles** Left-hand drive
**RHD Vehicles** Right-hand drive

Our Journey
## A decade of
structured growth.
From a two-person operation to one of Europe’s fastest-growing vehicle distributors.
2016
### EU Expansion Begins
First deliveries to Germany, France, and Italy. Partnerships with authorized importers across the EU.
2018
### Expansion & Partnerships
Growing dealer network across Western Europe. New supplier agreements with authorized importers. Consistent volume growth.
2020
### Own Fleet Transport
Invested in branded Mercedes-Benz and Scania car carriers. Full control over logistics and delivery quality.
2022
### ISO Certified · 2,000+ Vehicles
Achieved ISO 9001 & 14001 certifications. Crossed 2,000 vehicles per year. EAIVT membership confirmed.
2023
### €11M Turnover · 15+ Markets
Operations spanning 15+ European markets. Romania showroom operational.
2024
### €25M Turnover · 3,000+ Vehicles
Record year. 3,000+ vehicles distributed. Proprietary sourcing intelligence system deployed.
2025
### €27M Turnover · Slovakia Entity
Autorent Europe s.r.o. registered in Bratislava. Direct access to Central European dealer networks. Enhanced sourcing intelligence.
2026
### €50M Target · Autorent Capital AI
Scaling to 30+ markets. Building an AI-powered pricing and sourcing intelligence platform.
